title: adhd freestyle
body:
i got adhd
which one could take to mean i'm
lazy, crazy, and, hazy
amazing at mazes
amused by musing
cagey in cages
do what i'm doing not what the day is
owe what i am to the present and i make payments
i want this amount of repetition, no less and no more
i'm like "cool, you can go get that at the store"
that's not what this is for
i'm unbound by technique
you could be too
but you think you get your power cuz ya bow to the king
cower in that castle feeling safe cuz you kissed the ring
no choices for beggars
my voice is better than none
when you're facing the terrors that come from the void
that's all i'm ever offering
to see it together
i'm a letter not the law
i never said you had to fall in line
to gather anything mine
i'm not the measuring kind
i take pleasure in the digging
not the terra firma
i find a feather i'm flying
whether with or without a flock i'll be fine
until the weather decline
i'm tender but tend to not have a lot
i'm not buying the lines that they censure
and pretend are divine
no gods and no heroes
lotta ones and one zero
starting is trivial
ending extra judicial
framing is criminal
and naming is digital
please consider who
you give a finger to
i'm non violent
i don't kick rhymes
or punch lines
i slide in and stunt drives
he tried to gun it like one time
i looked at him once like
what do you want guy
you got steed and steel you thinking dark knight
i'm on my horse looking at a long road
wondering where i'm gonna park nights
where i'm going the opponent is hard to fight if you don't notice the omens
unmask him like oh shit yeah i know him from back before he was key holding
i said before this wasn't forever
i let em know this isn't for everyone
only the ones who get it
